CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD. DFDNT WILL VACATE PREMISES NO LATER THAN 12/31/00, 12 MIDNITE. PLTFFS WAIVED ALL RENTAL DAMAGES. IF DFDNTS VACATE PREMISES EARLIER PLTFFS WILL PAY DFDNTS $720.00 PER MONTH OR $23.79 A DAY AS AN INCENTIVE. NO SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. NO STAY OF EXECUTION.
